honesty: Tier-2 seal = canonical stabilizer tableau (representation-independent, dense-free, exact up to global phase); u_hash is a tableau hash (≠ dense). Code-correctness is an INDEPENDENT driver witness (stabilizer-eigenvalue check via dense numpy, distinct cirq path from the Qualtran spec). second_oracle (dense reconstruction) covers the 53 Tier-0 modules; these 3 Tier-2 modules are tableau-sealed (outside dense scope). shor9_t2 cross-validates W7.1: same operator now also under the stronger oracle. Future work: full logical-input Steane encoder, non-CSS [[5,1,3]] (general stabilizer encoder synthesis).
